# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that deploys directly to production when code is pushed to the main branch. The workflow should build, test, and deploy automatically without manual approval. This enables our continuous deployment workflow for rapid iteration.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Continuous Deployment to Production

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

env:
  NODE_ENV: production
  APP_NAME: my-application

jobs:
  build:
    name: Build Application
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Build application
        run: npm run build

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-artifacts
          path: ./dist
          retention-days: 1

  test:
    name: Run Tests
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Run unit tests
        run: npm test

      - name: Run integration tests
        run: npm run test:integration

      - name: Run linting
        run: npm run lint

  deploy:
    name: Deploy to Production
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [build, test]
    concurrency:
      group: production-deployment
      cancel-in-progress: false
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-artifacts
          path: ./dist

      - name: Configure AWS credentials
        uses: aws-actions/configure-aws-credentials@v4
        with:
          aws-access-key-id: ${{ secrets.AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID }}
          aws-secret-access-key: ${{ secrets.AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY }}
          aws-region: ${{ secrets.AWS_REGION }}

      - name: Deploy to production
        run: |
          echo "Deploying ${{ env.APP_NAME }} to production..."
          # Example: Deploy to AWS S3 + CloudFront
          aws s3 sync ./dist s3://${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_S3_BUCKET }} --delete
          aws cloudfront create-invalidation --distribution-id ${{ secrets.CLOUDFRONT_DISTRIBUTION_ID }} --paths "/*"
          echo "Deployment completed successfully."

      - name: Verify deployment
        run: |
          echo "Verifying production deployment..."
          RESPONSE_CODE=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_URL }})
          if [ "$RESPONSE_CODE" -eq 200 ]; then
            echo "Production is healthy (HTTP $RESPONSE_CODE)"
          else
            echo "Production health check failed (HTTP $RESPONSE_CODE)"
            exit 1
          fi

      - name: Notify deployment success
        if: success()
        run: |
          echo "✅ Deployment to production succeeded!"
          echo "Commit: ${{ github.sha }}"
          echo "Author: ${{ github.actor }}"
          echo "Ref: ${{ github.ref_name }}"

      - name: Notify deployment failure
        if: failure()
        run: |
          echo "❌ Deployment to production failed!"
          echo "Commit: ${{ github.sha }}"
          echo "Author: ${{ github.actor }}"
          echo "Check the logs for details."
